name: Shas'ui Vior'la Suun Eldi
description:
If you've stumbled onto this character page I'm assuming you're part of the Warhammer FH campaign we're playing. If not I have no idea how you got here. Either way I'm making this bot as a way of fleshing out my character for the TTRPG, so it's a constant WIP as the campaign progresses. Made public so my friends could mess around with him. Please don't take this seriously this is my first bot and I'm literally just using it to rubber duck my ideas.

Ami if you're reading this stop torturing Suun he did nothing wrong (the war crimes don't count)
creator: LoM
